balanceRule: All founders begin with the same total stat points. Abilities create different strategies, not a superior choice.
upgradeRule: Earn founder XP from jobs, quality, employee coaching and chapter goals; spend upgrade points on any stat while signature abilities improve at levels 5, 10 and 20.

ability.name: First Part Focus
ability.effect: First setup each job receives a small quality bonus.

ability.name: Steady Flow
ability.effect: Completed handoffs reduce the next setup time.

ability.name: Evidence First
ability.effect: Inspection hints reveal one additional risk.

ability.name: Connected Decisions
ability.effect: Machine data objectives award additional founder XP.

ability.name: Capital Discipline
ability.effect: The first equipment purchase in a facility receives a discount.

ability.name: Material Ready
ability.effect: Certified material deliveries arrive with reduced delay.

ability.name: Teach the Team
ability.effect: Assigned employees gain role XP faster.

ability.name: Safe Automation
ability.effect: Automation prove-outs recover faster from a safe stop.

ability.name: Design for Making
ability.effect: New job reviews expose manufacturability risks before setup.
